verses.1: Oh come, let’s sing to the LORD.
verses.2: Let’s come before his presence with thanksgiving.
verses.3: For the LORD is a great God,
verses.4: In his hand are the deep places of the earth.
verses.5: The sea is his, and he made it.
verses.6: Oh come, let’s worship and bow down.
verses.8: Don’t harden your heart, as at Meribah,
verses.10: Forty long years I was grieved with that generation,
verses.11: Therefore I swore in my wrath,
